speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Thakan se sharir toot raha hai, par 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai. Office pantry mein unhe mere accent ka mazaak udate suna toh dil baith gaya, par mere paas rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki mujhe login karke bacchon ki school fees ke liye extra shift lagani hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty frame where providing for her children overrides her own emotional pain.
text: Aapki thakan aur pantry mein jo chot lagi, us sab ko daba kar aap sirf ek machine ki tarah extra shift kar rahi hain taaki bacchon ki fees poori ho sake.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Haan, kyunki widowed hone ke baad samaj pehle hi ungli uthata hai. Agar main weak padi ya job chhod di, toh log kahenge dekho sambhal nahi payi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue (widowed/ungli uthana) detected. Soft restatement ending in a pause.
text: Samaj ke un taano se bachne ke liye aur apna ghar sambhalne ke liye aapne apne aasuon ko poori tarah rok diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Rone ka option hi kahan hai mere paas? Poore khandaan ki 'izzat' ka bojh mere sar par hai. Agar office mein mera accent thoda gaon wala hai, toh unhe mazaak udane ka license mil jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational disconnect and lack of empathy at her workplace.
text: office mein logon ka aisa bartav dekh kar aur bhi akelapan lagta hoga, jab aap itni badi jimmedari akele utha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Akelapan toh hai, but main uske baare mein soch nahi sakti. Abhi shift khatam karke ghar jana hai, bacchon ka tiffin banana hai kal ke liye. Dimag sunn ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the internal experience of constantly suppressing her emotions for duty.
text: Jab aap is tarah apni thakan ko ignore karke ek ke baad ek duty poori karti hain, toh andar kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Andar kuch feel karne ki capacity hi nahi bachi. Bas lagta hai ki kab ye din khatam hoga. Par agli subah phir wahi rat race shuru. Main ruk nahi sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time/duration of this endless cycle of responsibilities.
text: Roz subah se raat tak yahi endless daud chalti rehti hai, bina ek pal ke aaram ya khud ke liye soche.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Aaram karungi toh khayega kaun? Mere bacchon ka future meri salary pe dependent hai. 'Farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity is 3. Reflect the deep exhaustion hidden behind her duty.
text: Lagta hai is sab ko akele sambhalte-sambhalte andar se ek bohot gahri thakawat baith gayi hai, jise aap chah kar bhi kisi ko dikha nahi sakti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... bohot thak gayi hoon main. Dikhau kisko? Log toh pehle hi intezar mein hain ki kab ye widow aurat hilegi aur kab humein taana maarne ka mauka milega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion and separate her worth from the societal stigma of widowhood.
text: Apne logon aur samaj ke aise taano ke beech khud ko mazboot rakhna sach mein bohot exhausting hai. Hamare samaj mein widowhood ko lekar jo ungli uthane ki aadat hai, wo aapki ya aapki mehnat ki sacchai ko galat sabit nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain aap. Par jab pantry mein wo log has rahe the na mere accent pe, toh ek second ke liye laga ki kyu kar rahi hoon main ye sab? Kya izzat mili mujhe?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her questioning of the return on her immense sacrifices.
text: Wo mazaak sun kar andar ye sawal uthna lazmi hai ki itna kuch sehne aur sacrifice karne ke baad bhi aapko wo izzat kyu nahi mil rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi milti na izzat working auraton ko, khaaskar single mothers ko. Sabko lagta hai hum majboor hain toh hume kuch bhi bol sakte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic pattern of working widows facing workplace alienation.
text: Working women, khaaskar jo akele ghar chala rahi hain, unke sath yeh discrimination ka pattern bahut common hai—sirf aapke sath nahi hua, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj single mothers ki struggles ko seriously lene se katrata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Log aasaani se judge karte hain. 'Farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai... mere paas aur koi rasta hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the recurrence of her duty phrase and the feeling of having no alternatives.
text: Apne bacchon ke liye aapne khud ko poori tarah is kaam aur zimmedariyon ke hawale kar diya hai, jisme doosra koi rasta dikhai nahi deta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rasta hai bhi nahi na. But aaj sach mein himmat toot rahi hai meri. Extra shift mein login karne ka man nahi kar raha. Main kya karoon abhi, thoda focus chahiye mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity dropped to 2, readiness present. Offer small, actionable steps.
text: Aise waqt mein jab bilkul himmat na bache, tab duty karna aur bhi bhaari lagta hai. Hum do choti cheezein kar sakte hain—ya toh aap login karne se pehle 5 minute desk se door baith kar sirf thanda paani pee lijiye, ya phir apne phone pe bacchon ki photo dekh lijiye ek pal shanti ke liye. Aapko abhi ke liye kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bacchon ki photo dekh leti hoon. Wahi meri motivation hain. Unki fees deni hai bas is hafte. Desk par baithke screen wallpaper pe hain unki pics.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through focusing on the picture simply.
text: Pehle screen par bas unki muskurahat dekhiye thodi der… phir ek gehri saans lekar khud ko unki fees yaad dilaiye… bas itna hi aaj is shift ko shuru karne ke liye kijiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main dekh rahi hoon unhe. Unke liye toh main ye sab kar hi sakti hoon. Ye chote mote taane aur accent ka mazak meri mehnat se bade nahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the workplace discrimination structurally.
text: Bilkul nahi hain. Office mein accent ya background par mazaak udana actually logon ki apni chhoti soch aur class bias dikhata hai, aapki kshamata ya izzat ko nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye class bias toh sach me hai. Wo log AC me baithe hain, unhe kya pata akele bacche paalne mein kya lagta hai. Meri thakan unhe joke lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her frustration at the lack of empathy from privileged colleagues.
text: Un logon ko aapke sangharsh aur din raat ki is mehnat ka koi andaza hi nahi hai, aur unka nazariya aapko aur door kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa but mujhe unse door hi rehna hai. Main sirf kaam karungi, login karungi aur paise ghar le jaungi. I don't need their validation.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her self-reliance and focus on her core motivation.
text: Apne maqsad aur apne bacchon par ye focus banaye rakhna aapki sabse badi taqat hai; aapki izzat aapki khud ki mehnat se banti hai, kisi ke validation se nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Maine login kar liya hai. Shift shuru ho gayi hai meri. Thank you aapne meri baat suni. Kisi se toh nikalna tha andar ka gubar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her readiness to continue duty after venting.
text: Itni der se jo bhaari pan dil mein jama tha, thoda bolne ke baad aap apne kaam pe wapas lautne ke liye tayaar hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main calls lena shuru kar rahi hoon. Ek aakhri cheez, jab bhi main akeli mehsoos karungi is office me toh khud ko kya yaad dilau?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a grounding reframe she can use.
text: Jab bhi yahan akelapan lage, toh bas is reality ko yaad kijiyega ki aapka ye struggle aapke parivar ko ek behtar zindagi de raha hai, jo kisi bhi pantry ke mazaak se kahin zyada bada aur sacha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main yaad rakhungi ye sab. Bacchon ki face meri sabse badi sachaayi hai. Baaki sab moh maya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty-based resolve and grounding.
text: Aapke liye bacchon ki khushi hi ek lauti asliyat hai, jiske aage doosron ki baatein poori tarah se choti pad jati hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Choti hi pad jani chahiye warna main survive nahi kar paungi in logon ke beech me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask softly about her plan for resting after the shift.
text: Aaj ki itni lambi shift poori karne ke baad, ghar pahunch kar aap aaram karne ke liye thoda sa waqt kaise nikalengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ghar jaungi, bacchon ko sota hua dekhungi, kal ki subah ka thoda sa intezam karke so jaungi. Wahi aaram hai mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating close.
text: Apni poori thakan aur mushkilon ke bawajood aap jis imandari se har roz bacchon ke liye lad rahi hain, wahi aapki sachchi izzat aur mohabbat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Mera accent unke office meetings mein ek joke hai, par unhe kya pata ye meri din-raat ki mehnat ka nishaan hai jo main bacchon ki parvarish aur unhe community exclusion se bachane ke liye kar rahi hoon. IT sector mein itna competition hai ki main rona afford nahi kar sakti, bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon kyunki mujh par poore khandaan ki zimmedari hai. Main thak kar choor hoon par mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta, bas structural endurance hi meri majboori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the profound sense of duty and role obligation she carries above all else (Lens B).
text: Bacchon ko aur pure ghar ko bina ruke support karna hi aapki zindagi ka sabse bada maqsad ban chuka hai, bhale hi andar kitni bhi thakan ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Maqsad nahi, meri majboori hai. Ghar aur MNC dono jagah bas deliver karna hai. Main ek working woman hoon, sabki ummeedon par khari utarna hi padta hai. Koi nahi dekhta ki accent ki wajah se office mein kitna isolate feel karti hoon. Mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta, raat ko bhi kal ki meetings aur ghar ke rashan ka tension rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the relentless duration and non-stop nature of her dual burden (Lens D).
text: Lagaataar itne lambe waqt se MNC ka pressure aur ghar ka sara bojh akele uthate uthate ab dimag aur shareer ko saans lene ka thoda bhi waqt nahi mil raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Bilkul waqt nahi milta. Saans lene ki fursat ho tab na? EMI aur bacchon ki school fees ki tension sar par hai. Main unki life se community exclusion ka darr nikalna chahti hoon. Is chakkar mein bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the feared consequence of her children facing exclusion if she stops working (Lens E).
text: Is baat ka dar andar hi andar khaye ja raha hai ki agar tumne galti se bhi aaram kar liya toh bacchon ko samaaj ki un buri baaton aur taano ka samna karna padega...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Haan, aur apne relatives bhi toh taane marenge ki dekho shehar jaakar bhi aurat fail ho gayi. Mujhe pata hai I shouldn't complain, job hai aur paise aa rahe hain, that should be enough. Mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta kyunki main ek minute bhi weak feel nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responds to the stigma cue softly, mirroring the relational pressure to appear strong (Lens C).
text: Apne apno aur bahar walo ki nazron mein hamesha khud ko strong saabit karne ki yeh akele ki ladai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Akele hi hai sab kuch. Pura ghar, bacchon ka school, saas ki dawai, sab mere kandho par hai. Office mein wo log meri bhasha aur gaon wali English pe haste hain. Main thak kar choor hoon sach mein, I just wish koi mera thoda kaam baant le.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asks how she manages to find the drive to wake up to this exhausting cycle every day.
text: Jab office mein bhedbhav sunna padta hai aur ghar pe poore khandaan ki zimmedari akele uthani padti hai, toh agle din dobara machine ki tarah uthne ke liye khud ko kaise manati ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Manana kya hai, subah uthna hi padta hai. Pura din meetings aur ghar ke kamo mein nikal jata hai. Apna khud ka wajood hi bhool gayi hoon. I am just a provider now. Mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta, ye structural endurance hi meri reality hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflects the deep unexpressed EXHAUSTION stemming from the C4/C5 Duty_Based dynamic.
text: Lagta hai ki is IT job aur ghar ki zimmedariyo ke beech khud ko har pal saabit karte karte, ab tumhare andar ek aisi gehri thakan (exhaustion) baith gayi hai jo physical hone ke sath sath andar se bilkul akela kar deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Akela hi feel hota hai. Office mein log jab meri English par haste hain toh koi sath nahi khada hota. Ghar aati hoon toh saas ko lagta hai MNC me WFH bas 'time pass' hai. Koi samajhta hi nahi ki main kitni thak chuki hoon is cycle mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validates her exhaustion as culturally normal for her environment and separates her worth from the isolation.
text: Metro shehar ki is MNC duniya mein jahan bhasha ko lekar bhedbhav hota hai, wahan roz ja kar apna farz nibhana aur ghar aakar sabko sambhalna bohot overwhelming hai, aur is mahol mein tumhara akele thak jana bilkul natural hai, iska tumhari kabiliyat se koi lena dena nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Kabiliyat toh hai mujhme, tabhi itne targets meet karti hoon lagatar. Par mujhe hamesha invisible kyun feel karaya jata hai? Mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta aur meri mehnat kisi ko dikhti nahi. Bacchon ki parvarish ke chakkar mein maine khud ko hamesha peeche rakha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shares a brief systemic anecdote about the dual burden of working women to reduce her sense of isolation.
text: Working women ke cases mein ghar ka saara kaam karna aur office mein apni jagah aur izzat ke liye akele ladna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sabse umeed ki jati hai ki aurat hai toh bina awaaz kiye sab sambhal legi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Wahi na! 'Superwoman' ka tag de diya hai samaj ne, par andar se yeh superwoman ro rahi hai. Ab main aise thak kar nahi jee sakti. Mujhe is 'bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon' wali feeling se nikalna hai. Batao kya karoon main thoda relief paane ke liye abhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offers quick, duty-compatible grounding options to help her step out of the 'machine' mode.
text: Abhi is bhaari pan ko thoda kam karne ke liye, kya tum apne laptop screen se nazar hata kar ek glass theek thanda pani peena chahogi, ya phir chair par peeche tik kar sirf aankhein band karke lambi saans lena theek lagega?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Aankhein band karke thoda baithti hoon. Screen dekhte dekhte mere sir mein waise bhi bahut dard ho raha hai. Din bhar mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta toh kam se kam abhi 2 minute aankhein band kar hi sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walks her through the simple breathing/resting exercise step-by-step.
text: Pehle apni aankhein bilkul halke se band kar lo… apne kandho ka tanao thoda dheela chhodo aur dhyan sirf apni aati jati saans par rakho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: (Breathing) ... Haan, thoda theek laga. Par jaise hi saans leti hoon toh lagta hai chest pe kitna heavy weight hai is khandaan ki zimmedari ka. Aaj finally body me feel ho raha hai ki main kab se bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframes the physical weight in her chest as a natural consequence of the structural pressure, not a personal weakness.
text: Yeh chhati ka bhaari pan aur kandhon ka dard tumhari body ka tareeqa hai batane ka ki yeh jo poore khandaan ki zimmedari akele uthane ka structural pressure aur expectation hai, yeh asal mein kitna thaka dene wala aur unnatural hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Unnatural hi hai. Mere in-laws ghar pe aaram karte hain aur saari ummeed mujhse hai ki job, khana aur bacche sab theek rahe. Agar zara sa bhi health issue aya toh log mere IT job ko dosh denge. Mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta kyunki mujhe sab perfect dikhana hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the relational fear of being blamed by her family if she shows any weakness (Lens E).
text: Is dar se ki agar tumhari choti si bhi tabiyat kharab hui, toh log tumhari sari mehnat aur IT job ki izzat par seedha sawal uthayenge...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Exact yahi darr rehta hai. Bacchon ki thodi marks kam aaye toh bolenge ki maa computer pe baithi rehti hai. It hurts my heart so much. Main subah uthkar fir bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon in sab ko chup rakhne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirms her resilience and dedication to her children while reinforcing that her health is also important.
text: Apne bacchon ki image aur unke future ke liye akele har taane ko jhel kar itni door tak aana, tumhari ek maa ki majboot pehchaan dikhata hai, par is ladaai mein tumhara apna saans lena aur sehat bhi zaroori hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Sehat toh theek rakhni padegi. Agar main toot gayi toh khandaan ki zimmedari aur EMI kaun bharega. Office mein jab wo log accent par haste hain, tab bhi mujhe chup reh kar next target sheet nikalni hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asks how she manages to refocus on her professional targets when facing such exclusionary behavior.
text: Jab office ki meetings mein aise bhedbhav bhare taane aate hain, toh uss dard ke beech apne kaam aur agle target sheet par apna dhyan wapas kaise le aati ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Apne bacchon ka chehra yaad karke. Mujhe pata hai mera code accha hai aur un logon ka mazak mujhe neeche nahi gira sakta. Main bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon taaki promotion ruke nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the powerful drive she has to prove her capabilities despite the hostility (Lens C).
text: Bacchon ke chehre ki himmat aur apne kaam ki kabiliyat ke dum par aage badhne ka yeh junoon logon ki us chubhni wali hansi par bhari pad jata hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Yes, bhari padna padega. Lekin I admit, mujhe thoda khud ka dhyan rakhna chahiye. Mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta, par din mein ek chota pause lena shayad I can manage. Nahi lungi toh pagal ho jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validates her decision to take breaks as a smart structural strategy rather than a luxury.
text: Apne kaam ke dino ke beech mein chhote pause lene ki zaroorat ko pehchanna is baat ka saboot hai ki ab tum is MNC culture aur ghar ke pressure ke beech apni zaroorat ko aage rakhna seekh rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Try toh karungi. Main kal se lunch desk pe khate hue kam nahi karungi. 15 minute canteen mein shanti se baithungi. Even with this khandaan ki zimmedari, ek 15 minute ka break meri efficiency hi badhayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offers an additional tiny routine option to separate her two worlds of work and home duties.
text: Desk se uth kar bahar hawa lene ke alawa, kya ghar laut-te waqt auto ya cab mein 5 minute gaane sun kar ya bina kisi tension ke aankhein band karke safar karna theek lagega?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Auto mein earphones laga kar shaanti se baithungi. Normal days mein wahan bhi main sabzi aur khane ki list sochti hoon. At least cab mein mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta wali zidd ko side karke 5 minute rest kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirms this small boundary setting as a strong start to reconnecting with herself.
text: Auto ke un 5 minute mein sirf apne liye ek shaant jagah dhoondhna tumhari is bhari thakan aur structural endurance ke beech apne aap ko dobara se aaram dene ki ek bohot sundar shuruat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Thank you. Mujhe sach mein ye realise nahi hua tha ki main literally khud ko khatam kar rahi hoon. Abhi baat karke thoda lag raha hai ki mera control mere paas wapas aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the shift from feeling like a machine to regaining a sense of personal agency (Lens D).
text: Itne lambe thakan bhare daur ke baad, ab dheere dheere apne haq aur apni shanti par khud ka kabza wapas paane ki ahat mehsoos ho rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta
text: Haan, bilkul. Main abhi bacchon ke pas jaungi but pehle thoda chai peeyungi balcony me. Aaj mera 'farz' thoda delay ho sakta hai, nothing will collapse. Thanks for hearing me out without judging my English or my choices.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Leaves her with a final validation of her choices and her right to pause without guilt.
text: Balcony mein aaram se apni chai ka maza lena is baat ki pehchaan hai ki tumhne aaj apni mehnat ki keemat samajh li hai, aur yeh thehrao tumhara poora haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur unki izzat ke liye client deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon.
text: Colleague ke tano ke baad dil kiya ki laptop band kar doon, par phir yaad aaya ki home loan ki kist baki hai aur divorcee hone ke baad 'log kya kahenge' ka darr hamesha rehta hai. Main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur unki izzat ke liye client deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon. Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti, bas endurance hi meri pehchaan ban gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame where providing for children's future outweighs her personal pain.
text: Aapke liye baccho ki zarooratein aur unka future itna bada hai ki aap apne dard aur insult ko bhi peeche chhod rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur unki izzat ke liye client deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon.
text: Haan, aur jab society as a single mother judge karti hai tab koi option nahi bachta. Main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur unki izzat ke liye client deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon. Thak jati hoon, par EMI khud bharni hai kisi se maang nahi sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of carrying this dual burden of work and home without any break.
text: Itne lambe samay se akele saari aarthik aur ghar ki zimmedariyan bina ruke uthate rehna sach mein ek bhari bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur unki izzat ke liye client deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon.
text: Pichle teen saal se yahi chal raha hai. Office mein koi kuch kehta hai toh rone ka time kahan hai? Main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur unki izzat ke liye client deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon. Weak padh gayi toh society toh tayaar baithi hai divorcee ko failure bolne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of societal judgment keeping her trapped in endurance.
text: Logon ke judgment ka darr aapko thodi der rukne aur apni thakaan mehsus karne bhi nahi deta...

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi deta. Aaj meeting mein us colleague ne indirectly bola ki main ghar aur kaam dono balance nahi kar pa rahi kyunki mera family structure 'broken' hai. Sharam aur insult ke maare mera dimaag sunn ho gaya, par maine client ke samne kuch react nahi kiya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question about the internal experience of swallowing anger and shame at work.
text: Jab usne aisi chubhne wali baat kahi, tab client ke samne us sharam aur gusse ko daba kar chup rehne ka ehsaas kaisa tha?

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se lag raha tha jameen phat jaye aur main usme sama jaun. Par phir agle hi second bacchon ka chehra samne aa gaya. Mere akele ke upar sab hai, EMI aur unki fees, toh main bas shanti se sehan kar leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational bond with her children that forces her into silent endurance.
text: Aapke baccho ka chehra ek aisi wajah ban jata hai, jo aapko apne sabse dardnaak aur mushkil palon mein bhi chup rehne par majboor kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyunki bacchon ki nazron mein main ek strong maa hoon. Unko kya pata ki unki maa har roz office mein kitna chota aur akela mehsus karti hai. Breadwinner hone ka pressure aur society ki yeh 'divorcee' wali ghatiya nazar mujhe kha rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the isolation of masking her pain to maintain the strong breadwinner role.
text: As a breadwinner aapne apne aasuon aur dard ko bilkul jagah nahi di hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aasu nikalne ki ijazat hi kisne di hai? Kabhi kabhi sochti hoon ki kya meri bas yahi zindagi bachi hai? EMI bharna, office ke taane sunna, aur unhe ignore karna. Bahut thak chuki hoon main is roz ke natak aur responsibilities se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed exhaustion of constantly masking pain and performing duties.
text: Lagta hai ki lagaatar is breadwinner aur ek akele parent ke role mein apne aap ko mazboot banaye rakhne ke chakkar mein, ab aapke andar ek aisi thakaan baith gayi hai jise physical se zyada mental kehna sahi hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly yahi feeling hai. Dimaag kaam karna band kar deta hai. Par kisi ko dikha nahi sakti apni thakaan. Agar dikha diya toh wahi label lag jayega ki akeli aurat se kuch sambhalta nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her struggle as a working single mother and separate her worth from narrow societal judgments.
text: Apne akele dum par yeh sab afford karna aur baccho ko paalna aasan nahi hai. Humari society mein ek single working mother par aksar aisi hi unfair nazrein rakhi jati hain, par unki narrow thinking aapki mehnat aur kabiliyat ko kabhi kam nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sun kar thoda acha laga. Par sach kahu toh office mein aise taano ke baad dobara kaam par focus karna bohot humiliating feel hota hai. Main ignore karti hoon, par raat ko wahi insult dimaag mein ghoomti rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share that the pressure on working single mothers to silently endure is a common systemic issue.
text: Working mothers ke roop mein aisi situations aur taane sehna bahut common hai—sirf tumhara struggle nahi hai, lekin koi is dabaav ke baare mein khul ke bolega nahi kyunki society unhe ek failure ki tarah judge karne lagti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Koi baat nahi karta isliye mujhe lagta tha shayad meri hi situation kharab hai. Par ab meri endurance toot rahi hai. Mujhe nahi samajh aa raha aage ka, ab kya karoon main is humiliation ko handle karne ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable grounding choices she can do at work without adding obligations.
text: Aapka yeh samajhna ki kamzori aapki nahi balki situation ki hai, ek bahut zaroori kadam hai. Abhi aisi taano ke baad dimaag ko shant karne ke liye hum do chote raste dekh sakte hain: pehla, jab bhi aisa ho toh 5 minute washroom jaakar deep breathing kar lein, ya doosra, kaam ke beech laptop se hatkar thodi der pani peene ka break lein. Inme se aaj kya practical lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pani toh main waise bhi peeti hoon desk par. Par washroom jaakar 5 minute khud ko akela aur shant karne wala theek lag raha hai. Wahan mujhe koi judge karne wala nahi hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the washroom breathing exercise into safe, doable steps.
text: Yeh bilkul practical lagega. Pehle, jab bhi koi chubhti hui baat ho toh bina react kiye apni seat se uthiye… phir washroom mein jaakar chehre par thanda pani daaliye aur aaraam se do lambi saans lijiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thande pani se dimaag thoda toh thanda hoga. Par us colleague ko kya jawab doon? Agar main humesha ignore karke washroom chali jaun toh uske hausle aur badh jate hain, meri professional izzat kharab hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize workplace stigma as a structural bias rather than a reflection of her professional worth.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki workplace par aise comments aksar gender aur marital status ko lekar bani huyi purani soch ka nateeja hote hain, yeh unka narrow mindset dikhata hai, aapki professional izzat aur aapke kaam ki value usse tay nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi logic hai. Unki backward soch ki wajah se main kyun apne performance par asar padne doon? Maine apne bacchon ki achi schooling ke liye itni mehnat karke ye job maintain ki hai, main isko kisi ke taano se kharab nahi hone dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the priority of her career and children's stability over the colleague's taunts.
text: Baccho ke liye aur apne career ke liye banayi gayi aapki yeh mehnat bhari jagah, aapke liye unke taano se kahin zyada upar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Agar main aise tano par overreact karke apna job kharab karungi, toh EMI aur fees kaun bharega? Par phir bhi ek chid aur gussa toh aata hi hai na, usko bahar kaise nikalun bina kisi se lade?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question about where the suppressed anger goes at the end of the day.
text: Jab us gusse ko kisi ke samne dikhana safe nahi lagta office mein, toh ghar lautne par us jama hue gusse ka kya hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi gussa baad mein sir dard ban jata hai. Bacchon ke so jane ke baad main raat bhar overthink karti rehti hoon ki mujhe ye bolna chahiye tha, wo karna chahiye tha. Aur agle din super thaki hui uthti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the physical and mental duration of carrying unexpressed anger through the night.
text: Raat bhar yahi overthinking chalti rehti hai aur ussi wajeh se agle din aap bilkul usi thakaan ke sath apne din ki shuruat karti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan aur ye ek unhealthy loop ban chuka hai. Shayad ab mujhe ghar wapas aane ke baad bacchon ke sone par, ek diary ya paper par wo sari baatein likh kar nikal deni chahiye. Kahi suni thi maine ye journaling wali baat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her proactive thought of finding an outlet for her suppressed frustration.
text: Apne din bhar ke dabaye hue gusse ko safely bahar nikalne ka khud se ek rasta dhoondhna, aapki ek bahut samajhdari bhari koshish hai apne dimaag ko shant rakhne ki.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyunki mujhe gussa apne bacchon par nahi nikalna. Bacchon ke samne main unki wahi happy aur strong maa rehna chahti hoon. Wo log hi toh meri priority hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational effort to shield her children from her workplace distress.
text: Ghar aane ke baad office ka dukh bhool kar apne bacchon ke liye ek muskurati hui maa banne ki puri taqat lagati hain aap.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me. Unki muskaan dekh kar hi toh EMI wali job mein aage badhne ki himmat milti hai. Main paper wala likhne ka kaam pakka try karungi. Kam se kam andar ka zeher dimaag se bahar nikal jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question about how she feels considering this new coping strategy.
text: Us andar ke dabaav ko paper par nikalne ke is naye raste ke bare mein soch kar abhi kaisa mehsus ho raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda relived lag raha hai abhi se. Aisa feel ho raha hai ki at least ab main completely helpless nahi hoon aur mere paas un baaton ko handle karne ka ek apna private tareeka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift from constant suffocation to a sense of relief and direction.
text: Pehle jo ek ghutan wali majboori aapke sath din bhar chalti thi, ab usme thodi si rahat aur ek aasha ki kiran dikh rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, umeed mili hai. Main kal se hi start karungi. Office mein washroom break wala option aur ghar aakar diary mein sab likhna. Thoda self-doubt kam ho gaya hai baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her steps towards self-preservation amidst her overwhelming duties.
text: Apni duties aur logo ki in kadi baaton ke beech bhi khud ke sukoon ke liye yeh practical kadam uthana bahot badi baat hai, jab bhi thakaan ho toh yaad rakhiyega ki aap jis tarah akele sab sambhal rahi hain, woh kabiliyat-e-tareef hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai
text: Accent ka mazaak sunkar laga ki shayad main is corporate shehar ke kabil nahi, par phir bacchon ka chehra yaad aa gaya jinke liye mujhe 'izzat' se rehna hai. Single mother hone ke naate mujhe double mehnat karni padti hai taaki koi ye na kahe ki divorced hone ki wajah se main nakamyab hoon. Thak kar choor ho chuki hoon, par rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the duty frame first before probing underneath the exhaustion.
text: Aapke upar bacchon ki zimmedari aur izzat barkarar rakhne ka itna bada farz hai ki andar ki thakan ke bawajood aap bina ruke aage badhti jaa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai
text: Haan, main apni feelings ke baare mein soch hi nahi sakti. Ye divorcee hone ka dhabba waise hi pichha nahi chhodta, har field mein khud ko saabit karna padta hai... isliye chahe jitna ghutan ho, rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational pressure and stigma, keeping it short and ending in a soft pause per the stigma cue protocol.
text: Is samaj ki nazron mein khud ko lagataar saabit karne ka yeh dabaav bohot thaka dene wala lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot jyada. Kabhi kabhi yeh suffocation bardasht ke bahar ho jaati hai. Office mein log accent ko leke side mein haste hain, aur main wahi ghut kar reh jaati hoon. Par bacchon ka school, EMI sab dekhna hai, toh main bas smile karke sab jhel leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question after two restatements to explore how she manages this deep suffocation while maintaining her provider role.
text: Jab akele andar se itni zyada ghutan mehsoos hoti hai aur bahar sab kuch normal dikhana padta hai, toh is suffocation ko aap akele kaise handle karti hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai
text: Kahan handle kar paati hoon. Ghar aati hoon toh seedha bacchon ka khana, padhai, sabme lag jaati hoon. Kabhi rone ka man kare toh bathroom mein akele ro leti hoon taaki bacche na dekhein. Mujhe saari double shifts poori karni hain, rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to softly name the implied fear of what happens if her children see her break.
text: Kahin bacchon ke samne aapka dard zahir na ho jaye aur unhe insecurity na feel ho, is darr se aap apni takleef aur aansu bathroom ki deewaron ke peeche chupa leti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... Main unhe kisi ghabrahat mein nahi dekh sakti. Meri izzat aur jeene ka maqsad ab unhi se juda hai. Par sach kahun toh main is dohari zindagi ko jeete jeete poori tarah thak chuki hoon. Kabhi lagta hai mera apna wajood kuch nahi, bas ek bojh dhone ki machine ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep exhaustion underlying her duty-based coping mechanism.
text: Lagta hai is lagataar bojh aur dusron ki judgment ne aapke andar ek aisi thakan aur ghutan paida kar di hai, jahan aapko apna astitva sirf dusron ki duty poori karne tak hi seemit lagne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul aisa hi hai. Koi ye nahi puchta ki aakhir mujhe kya chahiye. Jab se main single mother bani hoon, logo ko lagta hai ki akeli aurat ko easily dabaya ja sakta hai aur use apni koi self-respect deserve hi nahi karti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her experience systemically by noting how society unjustly views single mothers, while affirming her core resilience.
text: Humare yahan society mein ek single mother ko aksar aisi nazron se dekha jata hai jo bilkul unfair hai, par jo lagataar mehnat aur himmat aap roz dikhati hain, wo aapki asli taqat hai, in logo ki narrow soch nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Taqat toh rakhni hi padti hai na. Par sach kahu toh is structural endurance wali life se main bore aur exhausted dono ho gayi hoon. Bahar se sab strong mother bolenge, par andar kya chal raha hai koi nahi janta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Disclosing a systemic anecdote normalizing how working mothers bury their pain under the 'strong mother' image.
text: Akele poora ghar aur career sambhalne wali working mothers mein khud ko andar se poori tarah thaka kar bhi muskurane ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka haal nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki sabko us 'strong mother' wali image ki fikr hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Us strong image ne toh meri ek kamzor insaan hone ki permission hi chheen li hai. Aajkal itni suffocation hoti hai ki mujhe raasta dikhai nahi deta. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aakhir main is bojh ke saath aage badhu kaise?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-effort, actionable suggestions fitting her extremely busy double-shift schedule.
text: Din bhar ke is tight schedule aur bhari thakan ke beech, shayad do choti cheezein hum try kar sakte hain: ya toh lunch break mein 10 minute akele chupchap aankhein band karke baithna, ya phir office se ghar aate waqt sirf apni pasand ka koi sukoon wala gana sunna bina kisi duty ke khayal ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wapas aate waqt toh waise bhi main agle din ke khane ka menu sochti hoon, dimag wahi chalta rehta hai. Par gaana sunne wali baat main try kar sakti hoon. 15 minute ke liye shayad main guilty feel na karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her step-by-step through the music listening suggestion to ensure it's actionable and small.
text: Pehle aaj jab office se nikal kar apni ride mein baithi, toh turant earphones lagaiye... phir koi aisa purana gana play kijiye jo aapko thoda aaram deta ho... bas itna hi aaj ke liye kijiyega, apne dimaag ko kuch der theherne ki chhutti dekar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aisi ek playlist bani hui hai phone mein, aaj wahi laga lungi. Par sach bataun, wo office walo ka mazaak, wo corporate elitism, mujhe phir se anxious kar deta hai. Aisa lagta hai meri saari mehnat inke samne kuch nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing corporate elitism as a structural flaw and separating her true capability from their biased judgment.
text: Jo log accent ya background ko lekar mazaak udate hain, wo asal mein unki apni class-based privilege aur elitism ka nateeja hota hai—yeh aapke kaam ki quality ya aapke lamba safar tay karne ki mehnat ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sayad theek keh rahe ho. Unki life shuru se hi aasan rahi hogi, unhe kya pata ek divorced aurat ko is makam tak pahunchne mein kitne papad belne padte hain. Par unki taane bhari aawaz dimag se nikalna bahut mushkil hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the duration of her hard work contrasted against the quick sting of their judgments.
text: Itni mehnat se yahan tak aane ke lambe safar ke baad bhi, jab wo log bina soche judge karte hain, toh unki baaton ko nazarandaz karke aage badhna sach mein bohot mushkil aur chubhney wala lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chubhta toh hai, par mere pas itni luxury kahan hai ki main naukri chhod doon inlogo ki wajah se. Rent, EMI, fees, sabka pahad khada hai. Mujhe wahi office mein rehna padega aur bardaasht karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the duty frame anchoring her strictly to her livelihood despite the emotional cost.
text: Apne parivaar ki zarooraton ko poora karne ka farz itna bada hai ki aap apni us chubhan aur dard ko dabe paon rakh kar usi jagah datti rehti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Datti toh rahugi, par main aur stress nahi lana chahti ghar pe. Bacche notice karne lage hain. Kal raat meri chhoti beti pooch rahi thi ki mumma aap hamesha thaki-thaki kyun lagti ho. Dil baith gaya mera sun kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of her struggle impacting her children's happiness.
text: Agar aapki beti aapke chere par udasi padh leti hai, toh aapko yeh darr satane lagta hai ki aapki thakan kahin in masoom bacchon ke dimaag par apna bojh na daal de.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main unhe kisi qeemat par apne stress ka hissa nahi banne de sakti. Unko khush rakhna hi toh mera ek lota target hai. Unke bina toh mera wajood aur bhi sifar ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the prolonged focus of all her efforts being dedicated to her kids.
text: Pichle itne saalo ki akele lagai gayi aisi kadi mehnat ka aur jeene ka poora maqsad hi hamesha se un bacchon ki ek befikr duniya basana raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isliye mujhe office ke us toxic logo se apna mental peace disconnect karna hoga. Un logo ki narrow soch meri aage badhne ki speed ya mere maqsad ko damage nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing structurally that disengaging from workplace toxicity is a valid tool to regain control.
text: Darasal workplaces mein is tarah ki toxicity ka asar tab apne aap kam hone lagta hai jab hum unki negativity ko unka issue maan kar, apna focus apni original priorities aur maqsad par kenda kar lete hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai
text: Sahi kaha, ye unka issue hai. Meri single mother wali fight unki corporate soch se bohot aage ki baat hai. Mujhe dhyan hatana padega waha se, kyunki rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the shift from feeling suffocated by duty to feeling empowered by it.
text: Apne baccho ki khatir aage badhte rehne ki is pakki niyat ne aapko in khokhli aur bhedbhav wali baaton se upar uthne ki ek nayi majbooti di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aani hi thi yeh majbooti. Kal se main kaam ke alawa unki personal comments ko entertain nahi karungi. Aur ghar aate waqt, cab mein shanti se apne songs enjoy karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering a second brief suggestion to help anchor her new sense of self-appreciation.
text: Is badlav ko thoda aur pakka karne ke liye, shayad raat ko sone se pehle sirf ek minute ke liye apne aapko choti si shabashi de sakti hain ki aapne aaj ka din bhi kitni himmat se face kiya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khud ko appreciate kiye toh arsa ho gaya. Sirf kamiyan hi ginti thi apni. Par ab lagta hai haan, kam se kam is koshish ke liye main khud ki tareef deserve toh karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her changing relationship with herself, shifting from harsh critic to gentle observer.
text: Khud par hamesha sakht rehne aur galtiyan nikalne ki purani aadat chhod kar, ab aap apne wajood ke sath thodi narmi aur apna-pan rakhne ke haq mein hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, narmi rakhna zaroori hai. Agar main hi apne is structural endurance ki keemat nahi samjhungi toh society toh waise bhi aawaz daba hi degi meri. Main ek capable aurat hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F to mirror the feeling of newfound clarity and self-assuredness.
text: Aapki is nayi soch mein jo ek azaadi aur apna-pan mehsoos ho raha hai, wo andar ki ghutan ko bohot saaf aur halka kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Halka sach mein lag raha hai aaj. Mujhe is baat ki clarity mil gayi ki chahe kuch bhi ho jaye, office mein inki aawazein mujh par bojh nahi dalengi ab. Main ready hoon is change ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her self-worth unconditionally and affirming her readiness to tackle the challenges ahead.
text: Yeh badlaav aur khud pe itna gehra bharosa jatana apne aap mein ek bahut badi jeet hai, aur jis garv ke saath aap in akele ki ladaiyo ko aage badh kar par kar rahi hain, wahi sachhi izzat aur kamyabi ki asli pehchaan hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har duty nibhati hoon
text: Bacchon ki schooling aur unke future ke liye main har din office aur ghar ki double shift karti hoon. Logon ke taane aur community exclusion ki wajah se bohot thakan hoti hai, par main thakan mein bhi har duty nibhati hoon taaki un par koi ungli na utha sake. Mera farz kehta hai ki main afford nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ko koi financial kami mehsus ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a warm normalising line for mild risk, then mirror the duty and role frame the Seeker opened with.
text: Akele itni saari zimmedariyan uthana wakayi mein thaka dene wala hota hai. Bacchon ke ache future aur unki har zaroorat ko poora karne ke liye, aap apni thakan ko piche rakh kar ek maa ka apna har farz nibhane mein lagi hui hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har duty nibhati hoon
text: Zaroori hai na, kyunki society mein financial precarity waise hi itni zyada hai. Upar se yeh divorce stigma. Agar main zara bhi ruki toh sab mujhe hi blame karenge. Main bimar hone par bhi har duty nibhati hoon kyunki mere alawa unka dhyan rakhne wala aur koi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of people blaming her if she stops, driving her exhaustion.
text: Akele poori family ka financial bojh uthate hue, aur society ki taraf se aane wale blame ka darr, aapko ek pal ke liye bhi rukne ya apni beemari par dhyan dene ka mauka nahi de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, society toh bas wait karti hai ki kab ek divorced aurat koi galti kare aur wo ungli uthayein. Hamari biradari mein bina pati ki aurat ka wajood hi ek daag samjha jata hai, isliye community ne mujhe poori tarah isolate kar diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue with a short, soft restatement mirroring the duration of this isolation.
text: Samaj ki in chubhnewali nazaron aur is akelepan ke bojh ko itne lambe samay se chup chap bardasht karna bahut bhari padta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har duty nibhati hoon
text: Bhari toh hai. Mera sharir kai baar bolta hai ki ab aur himmat nahi bachi, par phir bacchon ki school fees aur baaki kharche yaad aate hain. Main andar se poori tarah tootne ke baad bhi har duty nibhati hoon kyunki weak padne ka option hi nahi hai mere paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element—the sacrifice of her own body for the sake of the children's future.
text: Is poore safar mein jahan sharir bilkul jawab de raha hai, wahan aap sirf apne bacchon ki khatir apni har takleef aur kamzori ko andekha karke aage badh rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahun toh ab main insaan nahi, bas ek machine ban gayi hoon. Bacchon ka future banana mera farz hai, par is community exclusion aur in double shifts ne mere andar ki saari energy nichod li hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the deep exhaustion underneath her rigid duty framing as per phase 2 rules.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki in saari zimmedariyon ko bina ruke uthate hue, aur khud ko sirf ek duty nibhane wali machine maan lene se, aapke andar ek bohot gehra exhaustion bhar gaya hai jise aap chah kar bhi kisi se zahir nahi kar pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har duty nibhati hoon
text: Zahir kis se karun? Relatives toh pehle hi door ho gaye hain. Bacchon ke samne rona nahi chahti. Isliye bas chup chap har duty nibhati hoon aur raat ko apne aasu chupa leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her struggle as a culturally normal response for a single mother facing stigma, separating her worth from the outcome.
text: Ek working single mother ke taur par society ke is exclusion aur taano ko akele jhelna wakayi bohot unfair aur mushkil hai. Par in strict rules aur akelepan ki wajah se, ek maa aur ek insaan ke roop mein aapki mehnat aur value zara bhi kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Value kise dikhti hai yahan? Society mein ek akeli maa ki bas galtiyan count hoti hain. Agar bacche ne padhai mein zara bhi kam score kiya, toh seedha meri divorce ko blame karenge ki iski maa hi aisi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handle stigma cue with a brief restatement focusing on the role pressure, ending in a soft pause.
text: Logon ke is unfair judge karne wale ravaiye ne, apne farz ko bina kisi galti ke poora karne ka dabav aur bhi suffocating bana diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut suffocating hai. Din bhar office mein lagatar kaam, phir ghar aakar unka homework. Khud ke liye 5 minute bhi nahi bachte. Financial tension ka alag stress dimaag kha jata hai mahine ke end mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to normalize her pattern of hiding exhaustion behind duty.
text: Akele bacchon ko palne wali working maaon mein apni gehrai tak ki thakan ko farz ke peeche chhupa lena ek bahut common pattern hai — sirf aapke sath nahi, lekin koi aasani se is baare mein bolega nahi kyunki divorce ke baad samaj aurton se bina thake sab sambhalne ki umeed karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Expectations ka pahad hai sach mein. Par ab body jawab de rahi hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage kya karoon ki yeh physical aur mental thakan thodi kam ho, bina meri duty ya bacchon ka nuksan kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 quick, culturally fitting actionable choices that fit into her tight schedule.
text: Jab thakan is hadd tak badh jaye, toh chote steps turant madad kar sakte hain. Hum do aasan cheezein aaj try kar sakte hain: Pehla, office se aane ke baad bacchon ke paas jane se pehle 2 minute bathroom mein deep breathing karna. Ya dusra, sone se pehle apne kandhon aur gardan ko halke se stretch karna. Aapko abhi ke liye inme se kya feasible lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar ghuste hi toh time nahi milta, bacche aa jate hain. Par haan, raat ko jab sab so jate hain tab main wo kandhe stretch karne wali aadat try kar sakti hoon. Gardan mein bahut pain rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the chosen neck/shoulder stretch step by step.
text: Theek hai, isko abhi bahut aaram se ek baar karke dekhte hain. Pehle apne dono kandhon ko dheere se apne kano ki taraf upar uthaiye... ek lambi saans lijiye... aur phir saans chhodte hue kandhon ko ekdam dheela chhod dijiye. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye. Jab kar lein, toh bataiyega kaisa mehsoos hua.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine try kiya. Sach bataun toh kitne mahinon se maine dhyaan hi nahi diya tha ki mere shoulders kitne tight aur dard mein the. Thoda sa halka zarur lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe linking her physical pain to the cultural burden she carries.
text: Kandhon ka halka hona aur dard ka ehsas hona ye darshata hai ki society ke is divorce stigma aur perfection ke dabav ko aapka sharir physically hold kar raha tha. Ye thakan aapki kamzori nahi, balki us structural bojh ka nateeja hai jo ek akeli maa par unfairly dala jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe hain. Main khud ko hi blame karti aayi hoon ki main weak kyun pad rahi hoon. Par is double shift aur taanon ka burden toh sach mein kisi ko bhi tod de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from self-blame to recognizing the external pressure (Lens E).
text: Apne bacchon ke samne perfect banne ke darr aur society ki wajah se jo khud ko hamesha weak samajhne ki aadat thi, ab us soch mein ek clarity aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har duty nibhati hoon
text: Clarity zaroori hai. Main maa hoon aur main har duty nibhati hoon, isme mujhe kisi ko prove karne ki zaroorat nahi. Mujhe bas raat ko apne liye wo 2 minute nikalne honge stretches ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the temporal shift from relentless work to making a small space for herself daily (Lens D).
text: Itne saalon se lagatar dusron ke liye bhaagne aur mehnat karne ke baad, raat ko sirf apne aaram ke liye wo do minute nikalne ka yeh step kafi mazboot mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, is step se kam se kam meri gardan aur kandhon ko aaram milega. Ek aur baat, mujhe office mein WFH ka request bhi dalna chahiye hafte mein ek din ke liye. Pata nahi manenge ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her proactive thinking about WFH as a practical way to manage her double shifts.
text: Zindagi ke is phase mein WFH ka request daalne jaisa practical solution sochna aapki samajhdari ko dikhata hai. Ye step batata hai ki aap kitni achi tarah apni aur bacchon dono ki zaruraton ko balance karne ki koshish kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish hi karni padegi. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai log wapas bacchon par ungli uthayenge agar main kisi function mein nahi gayi, par mujhe apni health dekhni hogi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shifting dynamic where she prioritizes health over the fear of community judgment (Lens C).
text: Dheere dheere is double shift ko balance karne ki himmat aa rahi hai, bhale hi functions mein na jane par society ya logon ki baaton ka darr kabhi wapas bacchon ki taraf kheencha chala aaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Log bolte hain toh bolne do. Main apni mehnat ki kamayi se ghar chala rahi hoon, kisi ke aage haath nahi phailati. Mujhe ab khud par aur apni parvarish par bharosa rakhna chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a final systemic reframe reinforcing her independence over society's judgment.
text: Yeh samajhna ki society chahe kuch bhi soche, aap apne dum par akele independent life bita rahi hain, is baat ka saboot hai ki aapka haq aur wajood un logon ke judgment se kahin bada aur sammanjanak hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har duty nibhati hoon
text: Sahi kaha. Main sach mein aaj dimaag se bahut shant feel kar rahi hoon. Ek machine ki tarah jo main din bhar bas har duty nibhati hoon, us mindset se thoda break mila hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the reframed role from a machine back to a human being deserving peace (Lens B).
text: Ek sirf zimmedari uthane wali machine ke role se thoda bahar aakar, apni mehnat aur apni zarooraton ko dekh paana ek nayi azaadi aur shanti jaisa lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Azaadi lag rahi hai sach mein. Mujhe pata hai kal subah uth kar wahi routine start hoga, duty phir se samne khadi hogi, par main mentally ab zyada ready mehsoos kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her readiness and validate her steady strength.
text: Apne hi dimaag mein ek choti si shant jagah banane ka ye faisla, aage aane wale kal aur us routine ke pressure ko aaram se manage karne mein kafi badi takat banega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh yahi hai. Bacche bhi thodi der mein aate hi honge, toh main aaj chinta chhod kar unke sath baith kar thoda time bitana chahti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the final relational shift toward enjoying her children rather than just providing for them (Lens C).
text: Bacchon ki sirf parvarish ki tension ko hata kar, aaj unke sath khushi ke kuch pal bitane ke is faisle ne samaj ke un sabhi taanon ko kafi piche chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, main apni mehnat se ek acchi zindagi bana lungi apne aur unke liye. Aapse baat karke himmat mili, ab main apni raat ke stretches ka routine zaroor yaad rakhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a warm closing validating her capacity to move forward.
text: Mujhe is baat par poora bharosa hai ki apni is practical soch aur lagatar himmat se aap apni aur apne bacchon ki zindagi behtareen banayengi. Apna khayal rakhiyega aur us stretch ko enjoy kijiyega.
